name: ADMIN
description: Global Platform Administrator. Full access to all nested organizations, users, and platform settings.

name: ORG_ADMIN
description: Organization Administrator. Full access to the specific organization's users, departments, and documents.

name: AUDITOR
description: Compliance and Audit role. Read-only access to documents and activity logs within their organization.

name: USER
description: Standard employee role. Access to personal documents and shared organization knowledge bases.
